data.title: Ripple just moved 200 million XRP: Is a dump incoming?
data.description:
A Ripple-linked account has executed a massive on-chain transaction, transferring 200 million XRP, valued at approximately $410 million based on the market price of $2.05 on April 11. The timing and scale of the move have sparked speculation across the crypto community, especially as XRP trades near critical support amid ongoing legal uncertainty and volatile market conditions.  With investor sentiment fragile and broader trends in flux, the transaction has raised concerns about the token’s near-term outlook
source: https://finbold.com/ripple-just-moved-200-million-xrp-is-a-dump-incoming/

data.title: Swedish lawmaker urges government to establish Bitcoin reserve amid global economic shifts
data.description:
Swedish Member of Parliament Rickard Nordin has formally questioned the government about whether it will allow the central bank to add Bitcoin (BTC) to the country’s foreign currency reserves.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/swedish-lawmaker-urges-government-to-establish-bitcoin-reserve-amid-global-economic-shifts/

data.title: SEC hints at adopting ‘sandbox’ approach to regulating firms that trade crypto securities
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) may propose a sandbox approach to crypto trading, before deciding on a new framework tailored to the challenges of digital tokens.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-hints-at-adopting-sandbox-approach-to-regulating-firms-that-trade-crypto-securities/

This led to a jump in whale holdings and other positive movements keen to boost bull sentiments. The Largest Single-Day Inflow in Two […]

data.title: Fed’s Kashkari hints at liquidity support — Is $100K Bitcoin back on the table?
data.description:
Neel Kashkari, President of the Minneapolis Federal Reserve, addressed the issue of rising Treasury yields on April 11, suggesting that they might indicate a shift in investor sentiment away from United States government debt. Kashkari highlighted that the Federal Reserve has tools to provide more liquidity if necessary. While underscoring the importance of maintaining a strong commitment to reducing inflation, Kashkari’s remarks signal a possible turning point for Bitcoin (BTC) investors amid growing economic uncertainty.  US Treasury 10-year yields
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/fed-s-kashkari-hints-at-liquidity-support-is-100-k-bitcoin-back-on-the-table?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump Overturns IRS Rule on Crypto Brokers With New Bill: Report
data.description:
Donald Trump signed a bill on Thursday reversing the expansion of the IRS’s definition of a broker to include decentralized exchanges (DEXs). According to a new Reuters report, Trump has nullified the inclusion of decentralized finance (DeFi) exchanges in the IRS’s updated crypto tax reporting rules.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/11/trump-overturns-irs-rule-on-crypto-brokers-with-new-bill-report/
